Action: # Article Deletion Notifications: Article Deletion Notifications

Run the testdrive for deleted_articles to set up the fixtures for this test

http://testdoaj.cottagelabs.com//testdrive/deleted_articles
Log in to the system as an administrator

Go to the admin notifications page

http://testdoaj.cottagelabs.com//admin/notifications

Expected Test Results: There are no notifications listed for either user account supplied in the testdrive

Action: Go to the testdrive page without reloading it, and click the button marked "Run background task".

Expected Test Results: The text beneath the button confirms that the script executed successfully

Action: Return to the admin notifications page

Expected Test Results: A new notification is present with the title "Deleted articles in your journal(s) this week".
The notification content lists the titles and details of the deleted articles.

Action: Verify that if multiple articles were deleted for the same publisher, they are grouped into a single notification.
## No Notifications when no articles deleted
Setup: Ensure no articles have been deleted in the last 7 days (or for a specific set of publishers).

Expected Test Results: No new deletion notifications are received.
